audit_items.proof_trace: The property holds through three complementary mechanisms: (1) all command procs that close the current client use `freeClientAsync` (deferred, sets CLIENT_CLOSE_ASAP) rather than direct `freeClient`, so `c` is never freed synchronously during `call()`; (2) the one re-entrant path (Lua timeout) uses `protectClient`/`unprotectClient` to defer any `freeClient` call while the event loop is re-entered; (3) the `freeMemoryIfNeeded` path in `processCommand` is guarded by `if (server.current_client == NULL) return C_ERR` (L3367) before `call()` is reached, and `processInputBuffer` checks `server.current_client == NULL` (L1589) after `processCommand` returns.
